message:
beads: close unicode parity audit

Closed bd-212m.7.3: Unicode handling parity audit
- Comprehensive tests added to glamour and lipgloss
- CJK, emoji, combining chars, ZWJ all verified
- unicode-width crate provides Go-compatible behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-212m.7","title":"Wish/Platform limitations verification","description":"Verify and resolve README platform limitations (Wish SSH beta, Windows SSH untested, mouse drag, complex Unicode).

Scope:
- Run stability + parity audits for Wish SSH sessions.
- Validate Windows SSH compatibility (manual or CI).
- Audit Unicode handling across lipgloss/bubbletea/glamour.
- Update README + FEATURE_PARITY.md with verified status.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Each limitation is either resolved (with tests) or documented with evidence and justification.
- README limitations section updated to reflect verified state.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated with audit findings.","notes":"Files: crates/wish/src/*, crates/lipgloss/src/*, crates/bubbletea/src/*, crates/glamour/src/*, README.md.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:03.101452806Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:29:52.433475522Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.7","depends_on_id":"bd-212m","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:03.101452806Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.7.1","title":"Wish: stability + SSH session parity audit","description":"Audit Wish SSH session stability and parity with Go.

Scope:
- Compare session lifecycle, I/O handling, and middleware behavior with legacy_wish.
- Add stress tests for multiple concurrent SSH sessions (open/close, PTY resize).
- Add integration tests for TUI over SSH (smoke run).
- Fix any discrepancies or document limitations.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- SSH session lifecycle matches Go for connect/disconnect/resize sequences.
- Integration tests demonstrate stable multi-session handling.
- README limitation "Wish beta" updated based on evidence.","notes":"Files: crates/wish/src/*, legacy_wish for reference, tests/conformance or integration tests under tests/. Use russh session hooks and logging.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:16.743903043Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:29:59.429622793Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:16.743903043Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.7.2","title":"Wish: Windows SSH compatibility test","description":"Validate Wish SSH compatibility on Windows.

Scope:
- Define test matrix (Windows Terminal + OpenSSH client/server).
- Run basic Wish server example and verify session establishment, input, and rendering.
- Capture logs + screenshots/recordings as evidence.
- Document any platform-specific limitations or fixes.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Windows SSH connection to Wish example succeeds and handles basic input/output.
- Any failures are documented with repro steps and filed as follow-up beads.
- README limitations updated to reflect Windows SSH status.","notes":"Consider adding CI or a manual checklist for Windows testing. Use wish examples under crates/wish/examples.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:24.010044628Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:30:07.160107163Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.7.2","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:53:24.010044628Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- Add fixtures and unit tests to reproduce width/layout behavior.
- Validate rendering + alignment with unicode-width and adjust if needed.
- Document any remaining limitations.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
